name_cn:
MIUMIU BEAU Large Briefcase
Ebony
Full of high-end atmosphere, texture is gentle yet looks expensive, comes with a retro light luxury filter✨
Top-grade cowhide leather, soft and delicate touch, gets better with wear
Classic and neat bowling bag silhouette with smooth lines〰️
Extra-large deep interior capacity, enough for commuting, business trips, and daily outings, practical and stylish✅
🔍Size:34*24*10cm
📌Model:5BB117M1300
